<@289320818901778434> <@1301813973703852035> <@88644018673582080> Hello!

The correct spelling devised by our head writer is **Khlarcus**. He is indeed based on "Klarkash-Ton"; writer wanted to change up the spelling for a bit.
Sorry most of the lore text about him has remained machine translation until now, and as a result his name is all over the place. We will replace those with correct human translation asap!
Good to know! Thank you for your hardwork 🙏
